languages.text: "Я не боюсь пыток, Лорд-капитан. Вы можете делать со мной что хотите. Самый главный кошмар в моей жизни уже позади".
"I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."
languages.original_text: "Я не боюсь пыток, Лорд-капитан. Вы можете делать со мной что хотите. Самый главный кошмар в моей жизни уже позади".

traits.locale_text: "I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."
"I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."
"I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."

languages.text: 「拷問には恐れません、艦長様。どうぞご好きに。人生で最悪の悪夢はすでに終わりました」
languages.original_text: "I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."

traits.locale_text: 「拷問には恐れません、艦長様。どうぞご好きに。人生で最悪の悪夢はすでに終わりました」

languages.text: "İşkenceden korkmuyorum Lord Kaptan. Bana istediğinizi yapabilirsiniz. Hayatımın en büyük kâbusunu çoktan atlattım."
languages.original_text: "I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."

traits.locale_text: "İşkenceden korkmuyorum Lord Kaptan. Bana istediğinizi yapabilirsiniz. Hayatımın en büyük kâbusunu çoktan atlattım."

languages.text: «No temo a la tortura, Lord Capitán. Puede hacerme lo que quiera. Ya he pasado por la peor pesadilla de mi vida».
languages.original_text: "I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."

traits.locale_text: «No temo a la tortura, Lord Capitán. Puede hacerme lo que quiera. Ya he pasado por la peor pesadilla de mi vida».

languages.text: “我不怕酷刑，舰长大人，随您怎么处置。毕竟我已经经历过这辈子最可怕的噩梦了。”
languages.original_text: "I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."

traits.locale_text: “我不怕酷刑，舰长大人，随您怎么处置。毕竟我已经经历过这辈子最可怕的噩梦了。”

languages.text: « La torture ne me fait pas peur, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Vous pourrez bien me faire tout ce que vous voudrez. Le pire cauchemar de ma vie est déjà terminé. »
languages.original_text: "I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."

traits.locale_text: « La torture ne me fait pas peur, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Vous pourrez bien me faire tout ce que vous voudrez. Le pire cauchemar de ma vie est déjà terminé. »

languages.text: "Ich habe keine Angst vor Folter, Lord Captain. Ihr könnt mit mir machen, was Ihr wollt. Der schlimmste Albtraum meines Lebens ist bereits vorbei."
languages.original_text: "I am not afraid of torture, Lord Captain. You can do whatever you want to me. The worst nightmare of my life is already over."

traits.locale_text: "Ich habe keine Angst vor Folter, Lord Captain. Ihr könnt mit mir machen, was Ihr wollt. Der schlimmste Albtraum meines Lebens ist bereits vorbei."
